metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by Nikhil (github.com/rsnk96).

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Analyzes code diffs and files to identify bugs, security vulnerabilities, code smells, and architectural concerns, then produces a structured review report with prioritized, actionable feedback.

plugins.name: gitlab-mr
plugins.description: Creates GitLab Merge Requests using the glab CLI with gitmoji-prefixed titles and a structured MR body.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Rich shell status line for Claude Code showing branch, model, cost, duration, diff lines, and an optional quote.
